title: 2026 Golden Globes: Best Supporting Actress Predictions
text: Predicted Winner: Ariana Grande, Wicked: For Good. Nominees (alphabetically): Elle Fanning, Sentimental Value; Ariana Grande, Wicked: For Good; Inga Ibsdotter Lilleaas, Sentimental Value; Amy Madigan, Weapons; Wunmi Mosaku, Sinners; Teyana Taylor, One Battle After Another. Analysis: Ariana Grande has emerged as the frontrunner in this category alongside her co-star Cynthia Erivo in the musical sequel. The field features strong contenders from prestige dramas like Sentimental Value, which provides two nominees, as well as supporting players from major studio films. According to the analysis, the supporting actress race reflects the overall unpredictability of this Golden Globes season, where competition remains intense across all acting categories.
